headline: Barclays Raises PepsiCo (PEP) PT, Says Volume Recovery is Finally Showing
summary: PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) is included among the 10 Best Bear Market Stocks to Invest in Right Now. On April 20, Lauren Lieberman of Barclays raised the firm’s price recommendation on PepsiCo, Inc. (NASDAQ:PEP) to $158 from $154. It reiterated an Equal Weight rating following earnings. headline: Is PepsiCo, Inc. (PEP) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
